{{Quote|There are few groups who hate us more, and I believe we stand little chance of ever befriending the Bitthævrians. Our best option would be to just steer clear of the area altogether.|[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] Ayla Shar's intelligence report about the [[m'Yalfor'ac Order]]|<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>}}
'''Ayla Shar''' was a [[Miner/Legends|miner]] and a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] lieutenant.

==Biography==
A [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Korbin]], she began working as a miner, and later became a resource coordinator for [[Vulca Minerals]]. During her time in this position, she worked on [[Guiteica/Legends|Guiteica]]. As Vulca became more aggressive about [[Yttrium]] mining with the native [[m'Yalfor'ac Order]], Shar began to have an intimate knowledge of Guiteica [[Bitthævrian/Legends|Bitthævrian]] natives and the Order. Eventually, Vulca Minerals was forced to leave Guiteica, and replaced by the Bitthævrian-controlled [[Kadok Resources]].<ref name="AIR" />

Later, Shar joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and became a lieutenant. Her knowledge of industrial saboteur groups became very useful, and she helped in the hijacking of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ore haulers. She was a resource officer in different Rebel bases in areas with a high Imperial control.<ref name="AIR" />

On [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], Shar wrote a report on the [[m'Yalfor'ac Order]] and its leader, Colonel [[Quaal Tavier Catharius]], for the [[Task Force on Alliance Security]]. She specified that the Order hated the Rebel Alliance and that negotiations were not an option.<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' {{1stm}}
